description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named continuous-integration that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for linux-os and one for windows-os. The linux-os job should run on ubuntu-16.04, update APT, install dependencies, check out the repository, pre-configure, configure, build, prepare appimagetool, clone love-appimages, build an AppImage, and upload it as an artifact. The windows-os job should run on windows-latest with a matrix of platforms, clone Megasource, check out the repository, configure with CMake, install, and upload the install directory as an artifact.
